teachingHint: Your child is learning the /z/ sound. The letter 'z' says /z/ (a buzzy sound). Sometimes it's written as 'zz' at the end of words — still the same /z/ sound. teachingHint: Your child is learning the /kw/ sound. The letters 'qu' always go together and make /kw/ (like the start of 'queen'). The 'q' is never on its own — it always has a 'u' next to it. Help your child blend: qu-i-z → quiz. The underlined words are for your child to read — you can help with the rest!
